# FilmyChill

> FilmyChill is a daily-updated guide to what is worth watching this week — new theatrical releases and OTT/streaming arrivals — for India and seven other countries, with audience ratings, honest verdicts, and critics' takes synthesised from published review coverage. Lists are rebuilt twice daily from TMDB (streaming availability via JustWatch), Wikipedia critical-reception coverage, and YouTube trailer statistics. No pay-for-placement: no studio or platform can buy a position on any list. Last build: 2026-07-22T15:23:56.510Z.

## This week in India (2026-07-22)

In theatres:
- The Odyssey — rated 7.9/10 — https://filmychill.com/movie/the-odyssey.html
- Moana — rated 5.7/10 — https://filmychill.com/movie/moana.html
- Dhamaal 4 (Hindi) — https://filmychill.com/movie/dhamaal-4.html
- Idhayam Murali (Tamil) — https://filmychill.com/movie/idhayam-murali.html
- Lenin (Telugu) — https://filmychill.com/movie/lenin.html
- Alpha (Hindi) — https://filmychill.com/movie/alpha.html
- Evil Dead Burn — rated 6.8/10 — https://filmychill.com/movie/evil-dead-burn.html

New on OTT / streaming:
- Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — on JioHotstar — rated 7.7/10 — https://filmychill.com/movie/descendants-wicked-wonderland.html
- Heartstopper Forever — on Netflix — rated 7.0/10 — https://filmychill.com/movie/heartstopper-forever.html

## Key pages

- [This week's full picks — India](https://filmychill.com/): theatres + OTT, ranked, updated twice daily
- [New OTT releases this week](https://filmychill.com/new-on-ott/): grouped by platform (Netflix, Prime Video, JioHotstar, ...)
- [Weekly snapshot archive](https://filmychill.com/week/2026-W30/): permanent record of each week's list
- [About & methodology](https://filmychill.com/about/): how picks are chosen, data sources, editorial rules

## Film pages

Every listed film has a page at https://filmychill.com/movie/<slug>.html (or /<country>/movie/<slug>.html) with its rating, verdict, where-to-watch, OTT release date status, cast, and critics' take.
